title: CCTL Tiertagger
description: Display player's PvP Tiers in their nametag! (CcTiers)
body:
# TierTagger

Official tier display mod for CCTIERS.

![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ed87272a0001d595b6794d37e23d1e4cd78c6d7.png)

## Features

-  **HUD Tier Display** – Displays player tiers directly above nametags.
- **CCTiers Integration** – Fetches and displays live player rankings from CCTiers along With Mc Tiers and Sub Tiers(optional).
- **Automatic Gamemode Detection** – Automatically detects the current gamemode and displays relevant rankings.
- **Player Search** – View player tiers, peaks, regions, points, global rankings, and skin information.
- **Multi-Gamemode Support** – Supports Sword, Crystal, NethPot, Potion, Mace, UHC, Axe, SMP, and more.
- **Highest Tier Detection** - Automatically displays a player's highest available tier.
- **Display Modes** – Choose between selected gamemode, adaptive highest, or absolute highest rankings.
- **Custom Layouts** – Configure displayed gamemodes and their positions.
- **Custom Styling** – Customize icons, colors, and visual presets.
- **Region Support** – Displays player region information alongside rankings.
- **Real-Time Updates** – Keeps ranking information up to date automatically.
- **Lightweight & Optimized** – Designed for minimal performance impact.
## Showcase

![#1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a154932b572a5b28077a4e760519a2bdb7d3688.png)

![#2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/126fec7e60580c357743a37c4c3f6b020e689ff1.png)

## Requirements
> Minecraft 1.21.1 - 1.21.11
> Fabric Loader 0.16.0+
> Java 21

NOTE: This mod depends [Ukulib ](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib) to work!

## Installation
1. Download the latest release from the [Versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/cctl-tiertagger/versions) page.
2. Install the required dependencies:
   [Fabric Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
   [Ukulib ](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib)
3. Place the .jar file in your .minecraft/mods folder.
4. Join a server and enjoy

# Configuration
The mod creates a config file at .minecraft/config/tagger.toml

**Note:** If You previously have any other tier tagger mod just go to .minecraft or ur launchers game config and delete the old tiertagger config eg: "tiertagger.yoml" it will recreate automatically when you launch the game so feel free to delete it.

## Minecraft version support

> Currently supported versions: 1.21+ through 1.21.11

**Future version support:** once Mojang switches to the new versioning system next year, the last 4 minor releases will be supported. During the transition phase (until 26.4), 1.21.1 and 1.21.11 will remain supported.

## API Integration

> This mod integrates with the Cctiers API to fetch real-time player rankings, tiers, regions, and gamemode statistics.
> Data is retrieved automatically and cached locally to reduce API requests while keeping information up to date.

**If you enjoy this mod, please:**

⭐ Leave a review on Modrinth
💬 Join our Discord community
🔗 Share with other server owners

Thank you for using CCTL TierTagger!

**Made with ❤️ by LT1_Golem | lt1_golem**

Building the future of Minecraft PvP tiers, one player at a time.
